stemHtml: An aeroplane is entering the transonic range whilst maintaining straight and level flight. If the Mach number increases, what additional input or action will be required to maintain straight and level flight to compensate for the centre of pressure’s movement, when the transonic region has been entered?

options.b: A pitch up input of the elevator or the stabiliser.
options.c: A higher IAS to compensate the nose down effect.
options.d: A pitch down input of the elevator or the stabiliser.
